description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in BetaParticle Blog 6.0 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) id parameter to template_permalink.asp or (2) fldGalleryID parameter to template_gallery_detail.asp.
